<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Support; use PhpParser\Parser; use PhpParser\ParserFactory; class PhpParserFactory { public static function make(): Parser { if (self::version() === 4) { return (new ParserFactory)->create(ParserFactory::PREFER_PHP7); // @phpstan-ignore-line } return (new ParserFactory)->createForNewestSupportedVersion(); } public static function version(): int { return method_exists(ParserFactory::class, 'create') ? 4 : 5; } }
